title: Registration Data Doctors First Report of Injury Relative Providers of Riverside Community Hospital

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

The Attached Registration Instruction nearly approximates a data dictionary for the database used for the doctors first report of injury. Please provide the list of doctor that have registered as providers for RIVERSIDE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL RIVERSIDE EAMS Lien Claimant No 12313355

The NPI NUMBER IS 1083317911 the State of California has apparently also created a site out of the hospital with another NPESS but this is first inquiry the information sought from the registration for NPI NUMBER = 1083317911 is

Physicians License Number, Physicians First Name, Physicians Middle Name, Physicians Last Name, Physicians Address Suite, Physicians Organization Name
Physicians Email, Physicians Phone Number, Physicians Specialty 1, Physicians, Specialty, Physicians Specialty 3, Medical Office Location-2



SUDO CODE IS PROVIDED AS FOLLOWS

SELECT, License Number, Physicians First Name, Physicians Middle Name, Physicians Last Name, Physicians Address Suite, Physicians Organization Name
Physicians Email, Physicians Phone Number, Physicians Specialty 1, Physicians, Specialty, Physicians Specialty 3, Medical Office Location-2
FROM PHYSICIAN_REGISTRATION
WHERE NPI = '1083317911' 


OTHER REFERENCES:
http://npiregistry.cms.hhs.gov

https://www.dir.ca.gov/DWC/EAMS/EAMS-LC/EAMSLienClaimants.asp

https://cadir.prod.simpligov.com/prod/auth/identity/login

https://services.dir.ca.gov/gsp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=06583be64773a29017f67688c26d436b

Manual
https://www.dir.ca.gov/dwc/Electronic-Reporting-System-for-DFR/Doctors-First-Report-Online-System-User-Manual.pdf


ATTACHMENTS:
Registration Instructions

Please provide paper registrations in addition to electronic

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Bryant Farnham

title: 2026-03-27_PHA_INQ_1 POLICY DEFINITION 1 FOR NEW PRA DATABASE IMPLEMENTION

communications.subject: California Public Records Act Request: 2026-03-27_PHA_INQ_1 POLICY DEFINITION 1 FOR NEW PRA DATABASE IMPLEMENTION
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

In regard to the new public record act database being found today 03/27/2026 at:

 https://services.dir.ca.gov/gsp



Please provide process, criteria, rule, regulation, order, or standard of general application or the amendment, supplement 


where a

public records request

is affected by a 

law enforced or administered by it, or to govern its procedure revision any rule, regulation, order, or standard to implement, interpret, or make specific

to affect the result of a public records act request to


change state of the public record request from being open to cancelled.

The attached pdf is an artifact of cancellation where the above-mentioned application is sought to be understood.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Bryant Farnham
